general.description: Affordable, tasty rooftop dining experience for the Cebuano community.
general.address: Along St. Joseph the Worker Parish Church, Cebu South Road, Tabunoc, Talisay, Cebu

hero.subtitle: Grilled Tuna • Pork Belly • Sizzling Sisig • Silogan Meals
hero.description: Affordable meals for the Cebuano community.
hero.location: Tabunok, Talisay • Beside St. Joseph the Worker Parish Church

highlights.title: Rooftop Night Vibes
highlights.description: Dine under the stars with cozy warm lighting and a cool Cebu breeze.

highlights.title: Affordable Silogan & Grilled Favorites
highlights.description: Great food that won't break the bank. Meals starting at budget-friendly prices.

highlights.title: Perfect for Barkada & Family
highlights.description: Spacious rooftop setting perfect for group dinners, celebrations, and hangouts.

signatureDishes.name: Grilled Tuna Panga
signatureDishes.description: Fresh tuna jaw grilled over charcoal, served sizzling with soy-calamansi dip.

signatureDishes.name: Grilled Pork Belly
signatureDishes.description: Thick-cut pork belly, smoky and tender, paired with vinegar dip and rice.

signatureDishes.name: Sizzling Sisig
signatureDishes.description: Chopped pork face seasoned with calamansi and chili, topped with egg on a hot plate.

signatureDishes.name: Chicken Bufafa
signatureDishes.description: Kuxinero's signature crispy chicken tossed in a tangy buffalo-inspired sauce.

signatureDishes.name: Silogan Meals
signatureDishes.description: Classic Filipino breakfast meals — egg, garlic rice, and your choice of viand.

menuPageItems.name: Grilled Tuna Panga
menuPageItems.description: Fresh catch, charcoal-grilled to perfection. Served with rice.

menuPageItems.name: Grilled Pork Belly
menuPageItems.description: Juicy, crispy, and a Filipino crowd favorite. Best paired with rice.

menuPageItems.name: Sizzling Pork Sisig
menuPageItems.description: Sizzling hot on a plate, a classic Pinoy pulutan. Perfect with beer.

menuPageItems.name: Chicken Bufafa
menuPageItems.description: Tender chicken with a unique blend of local spices and herbs.

menuPageItems.name: Silogan Meals
menuPageItems.description: Hearty silog combos: sinangag, itlog, and your choice of ulam.

menuPageItems.name: Chicken Inasal
menuPageItems.description: Marinated and grilled chicken, Bacolod style with annatto oil.

menuPageItems.name: Sisig with Rice
menuPageItems.description: Classic sisig served hot with garlic rice on the side.

menuPageItems.name: Hamsilog
menuPageItems.description: Ham, sinangag, and itlog — a timeless Filipino breakfast combo.

menuPageItems.name: Longsilog
menuPageItems.description: Sweet longganisa paired with garlic rice and fried egg.

menuPageItems.name: Chicken Pamasin
menuPageItems.description: Crispy chicken tossed in a savory-sour parmesan glaze.

rooftopExperience.heading: Dine Under the Cebu Night Sky
rooftopExperience.subheading: Warm lights, cool breeze, unforgettable nights.

reviews.name: Maria C.
reviews.text: Best sisig in Talisay! The rooftop vibe is so chill and affordable. We always come back with our barkada.

reviews.name: John Rey D.
reviews.text: Grilled tuna panga is a must-try. Huge serving for the price. Kids loved the silogan meals too!

reviews.name: Cherry L.
reviews.text: Love the ambiance at night. Very relaxing with great food. The chicken bufafa is our favorite!

location.heading: Visit Us
location.address: Along St. Joseph the Worker Parish Church, Cebu South Road, Purok Lopez Jaena, Barangay Tabunoc, Talisay, Philippines
